# chatview — Flutter Chat UI Package

**Version:** 3.0.0 | **Import:** `package:chatview/chatview.dart`
**Pub:** https://pub.dev/packages/chatview | **Platforms:** Android, iOS, macOS, Web, Linux, Windows

Two main widgets: `ChatView` (single conversation screen) and `ChatList` (conversation list screen).

---

## Quick Setup

```dart
// 1. Controller
final controller = ChatController(
  initialMessageList: messages,   // List<Message>
  scrollController: ScrollController(),
  currentUser: ChatUser(id: '1', name: 'Me'),
  otherUsers: [ChatUser(id: '2', name: 'Them')],
);

// 2. Widget
ChatView(
  chatController: controller,
  onSendTap: (message, replyMessage, messageType) {
    controller.addMessage(Message(
      id: UniqueKey().toString(),
      message: message,
      createdAt: DateTime.now(),
      sentBy: '1',
      replyMessage: replyMessage,
      messageType: messageType,
    ));
  },
  chatViewState: ChatViewState.hasMessages,
)
```

---

## ChatView — Full Config Tree

```
ChatView(
  chatController: ChatController          ← manages messages & users
  onSendTap: OnSendTap                    ← REQUIRED: (message, replyMsg, type) → void
  chatViewState: ChatViewState            ← hasMessages | loading | error | noData
  chatViewStateConfig: ChatViewStateConfiguration  ← custom widgets for each state

  appBar: ChatViewAppBar                  ← top navigation bar
  chatBackgroundConfiguration: ChatBackgroundConfiguration  ← screen background

  chatBubbleConfig: ChatBubbleConfiguration        ← message bubbles
  reactionPopupConfig: ReactionPopupConfiguration  ← emoji reaction sheet
  repliedMessageConfig: RepliedMessageConfiguration ← reply preview in bubble
  messageConfig: MessageConfiguration              ← custom message type builders

  sendMessageConfig: SendMessageConfiguration      ← input bar (text, voice, images)
  textFieldConfig: TextFieldConfiguration          ← text input appearance
  replyMessageBuilder: (ctx, state) → Widget       ← custom reply preview above input

  typeIndicatorConfig: TypeIndicatorConfiguration  ← "typing..." bubble
  replySuggestionsConfig: ReplySuggestionsConfig   ← quick reply chips

  featureActiveConfig: FeatureActiveConfig         ← feature on/off flags
  swipeToReplyConfig: SwipeToReplyConfiguration    ← swipe gesture
  textSelectionConfig: TextSelectionConfig         ← text selection behavior

  loadMoreData: (ChatPaginationDirection, Message) → Future<void>  ← pagination
  isLastPage: () → bool                           ← stop pagination
  loadingWidget: Widget                            ← pagination loader

  scrollToBottomButtonConfig: ScrollToBottomButtonConfig  ← scroll-to-bottom FAB
)
```

---

## Visual Element → Config Path

| What you see in UI | Config class + path |
|---|---|
| **Message bubble (outgoing)** | `chatBubbleConfig.outgoingChatBubbleConfig: ChatBubble` |
| **Message bubble (incoming)** | `chatBubbleConfig.inComingChatBubbleConfig: ChatBubble` |
| Bubble color | `ChatBubble.color` |
| Bubble shape / corners | `ChatBubble.borderRadius` |
| Bubble text style | `ChatBubble.textStyle` |
| Bubble padding | `ChatBubble.padding` |
| Bubble shadow | `ChatBubble.boxShadow` |
| **Message timestamp** | `chatBubbleConfig.inComingChatBubbleConfig.messageTimeTextStyle / messageTimeIconColor` |
| **Read receipts (✓✓ ticks)** | `featureActiveConfig.receiptsBuilderVisibility` + `chatBubbleConfig.outgoingChatBubbleConfig.receiptsWidget` |
| **Sender name above bubble** | `featureActiveConfig.enableOtherUserName` + `chatBubbleConfig.inComingChatBubbleConfig.senderNameTextStyle` |
| **Emoji reaction row** | `reactionPopupConfig: ReactionPopupConfiguration` |
| Reaction popup background | `reactionPopupConfig.backgroundColor` |
| Reaction popup shadow | `reactionPopupConfig.shadow` |
| Reaction popup emoji list | `reactionPopupConfig.emojiList` (List<String>) |
| **Reply preview inside bubble** | `repliedMessageConfig: RepliedMessageConfiguration` |
| Reply background color | `repliedMessageConfig.backgroundColor` |
| Reply vertical bar color | `repliedMessageConfig.verticalBarColor` |
| Reply highlight on scroll | `repliedMessageConfig.repliedMsgAutoScrollConfig.enableHighlightRepliedMsg` |
| **"Typing..." indicator** | `typeIndicatorConfig: TypeIndicatorConfiguration` |
| Typing dots color (bright) | `typeIndicatorConfig.flashingCircleBrightColor` |
| Typing dots color (dark) | `typeIndicatorConfig.flashingCircleDarkColor` |
| Custom typing widget | `typeIndicatorConfig.customIndicator` |
| Show/hide typing indicator | `chatController.setTypingIndicator = true/false` |
| **Top app bar** | `appBar: ChatViewAppBar` |
| App bar avatar | `ChatViewAppBar.profilePicture` + `imageType` |
| App bar title | `ChatViewAppBar.chatTitle` |
| App bar subtitle / status | `ChatViewAppBar.userStatus` |
| App bar action buttons | `ChatViewAppBar.actions` |
| **Input/send bar** | `sendMessageConfig: SendMessageConfiguration` |
| Send button icon | `sendMessageConfig.sendButtonConfig.icon` |
| Send button color | `sendMessageConfig.sendButtonConfig.iconColor` |
| Enable/disable image send | `sendMessageConfig.imagePickerIconsConfig` |
| Enable/disable voice | `VoiceRecordingConfiguration` inside `sendMessageConfig` |
| Voice waveform style | `sendMessageConfig.voiceRecordingConfiguration.waveStyle: WaveStyle` |
| Leading input actions | `textFieldConfig.leadingActions: (ctx, controller) → List<Widget>` |
| Trailing input actions | `textFieldConfig.trailingActions: (ctx, controller) → List<Widget>` |
| Camera button | `CameraActionButton` (built-in widget) |
| Gallery button | `GalleryActionButton` (built-in widget) |
| Overlay/more button | `OverlayActionButton` + `OverlayActionWidget` list |
| Input text field style | `textFieldConfig.textStyle` |
| Input hint text | `textFieldConfig.hintText` |
| Input border | `textFieldConfig.border` |
| Input background color | `textFieldConfig.decoration` |
| **Reply suggestions chips** | `replySuggestionsConfig: ReplySuggestionsConfig` |
| Suggestion chip style | `replySuggestionsConfig.itemConfig: SuggestionItemConfig` |
| Suggestion list layout | `replySuggestionsConfig.listConfig: SuggestionListConfig` |
| Add/remove suggestions | `chatController.addReplySuggestions(list)` / `.removeReplySuggestions()` |
| **Link preview card** | `chatBubbleConfig.linkPreviewConfig: LinkPreviewConfiguration` |
| Link preview title style | `linkPreviewConfig.titleStyle` |
| Link preview body style | `linkPreviewConfig.bodyStyle` |
| Link preview background | `linkPreviewConfig.backgroundColor` |
| **Screen background** | `chatBackgroundConfiguration: ChatBackgroundConfiguration` |
| Background color | `chatBackgroundConfiguration.backgroundColor` |
| Background image | `chatBackgroundConfiguration.backgroundImage` |
| **Swipe-to-reply gesture** | `swipeToReplyConfig: SwipeToReplyConfiguration` |
| Swipe enable/disable | `featureActiveConfig.enableSwipeToReply` |
| Swipe left callback | `swipeToReplyConfig.onLeftSwipe` |
| Swipe right callback | `swipeToReplyConfig.onRightSwipe` |
| **"Last seen" text** | `featureActiveConfig.lastSeenAgoBuilderVisibility` |
| **Pagination loader** | `loadingWidget` on `ChatView` |
| Scroll-to-bottom button | `scrollToBottomButtonConfig: ScrollToBottomButtonConfig` |

---

## Feature Flags (`FeatureActiveConfig`)

```dart
featureActiveConfig: FeatureActiveConfig(
  enableSwipeToReply: true,          // swipe gesture on messages
  enableSwipeToSeeTime: true,        // swipe left to reveal timestamp
  enablePagination: true,            // infinite scroll / lazy loading
  enableOtherUserName: true,         // show sender name above bubble (groups)
  enableReactionPopup: true,         // long-press emoji reaction popup
  enableCurrentUserProfileAvatar: false, // avatar next to your own messages
  enableOtherUserProfileAvatar: true,    // avatar next to other's messages
  lastSeenAgoBuilderVisibility: true,    // "last seen X ago" text
  receiptsBuilderVisibility: true,       // ✓✓ read receipt icons
  enableTextSelection: false,            // selectable message text
)
```

---

## Key Models

### Message
```dart
Message(
  id: String,                          // unique
  message: String,                     // text content (or file path for images)
  createdAt: DateTime,
  sentBy: String,                      // ChatUser.id
  messageType: MessageType,            // text | image | voice | custom
  status: MessageStatus,               // pending | sent | delivered | read | undelivered
  replyMessage: ReplyMessage,          // non-null if replying
  reaction: Reaction,                  // emoji reactions on this message
  isFirstInGroup: bool,                // auto-set; true = show avatar/name
  isLastInGroup: bool,                 // auto-set; true = show timestamp
)
```

### ChatUser
```dart
ChatUser(
  id: String,
  name: String,
  profilePhoto: String?,   // URL or asset path
  imageType: ImageType,    // network | asset
)
```

### ReplyMessage
```dart
ReplyMessage(
  messageId: String,
  message: String,
  replyBy: String,        // ChatUser.id who is replying
  replyTo: String,        // ChatUser.id being replied to
  messageType: MessageType,
)
```

---

## ChatController API

```dart
chatController.addMessage(message)              // append new message
chatController.loadMoreData(messages, direction: ChatPaginationDirection)
chatController.replaceMessageList(messages)     // replace entire list
chatController.updateMessage(message)           // update existing by id
chatController.updateMessageStatus(messageId, status)
chatController.removeMessage(messageId)
chatController.setTypingIndicator = true/false  // show/hide typing bubble
chatController.addReplySuggestions(list)        // show quick reply chips
chatController.removeReplySuggestions()
chatController.scrollToLastMessage()
chatController.initialMessageList               // current List<Message>
chatController.currentUser                      // ChatUser
chatController.otherUsers                       // List<ChatUser>
```

---

## Message Types

| Type | `MessageType` value | Platform support |
|---|---|---|
| Text | `MessageType.text` | All |
| Image | `MessageType.image` | All |
| Voice | `MessageType.voice` | Android, iOS only |
| Custom | `MessageType.custom` | All |

Custom message rendering:
```dart
messageConfig: MessageConfiguration(
  customMessageBuilder: (replyMessage) => YourWidget(),
  showReactionsOnCustomMessages: true,
)
```

---

## ChatList — Full Config Tree

```
ChatList(
  controller: ChatListController          ← manages list state
  appbar: ChatListAppBar                  ← top bar
  tileConfig: ListTileConfig              ← each conversation row
  menuConfig: ChatMenuConfig              ← long-press context menu
  searchConfig: SearchConfig              ← search bar
  header: Widget                          ← widget above list (filter chips, etc.)
  footer: Widget                          ← widget below list
  stateConfig: ListStateConfig            ← empty/error state widgets
  loadMoreConfig: LoadMoreConfig          ← pagination loader style
)
```

### ListTileConfig — visual elements

| What you see | Property |
|---|---|
| User name text style | `userNameTextStyle` |
| Last message text style | `lastMessageTextStyle` |
| Avatar size | `userAvatarConfig.radius` |
| Avatar background | `userAvatarConfig.backgroundColor` |
| Online indicator dot | `userActiveStatusConfig: UserActiveStatusConfig` |
| Online dot color | `userActiveStatusConfig.color: (status) → Color` |
| Online dot position | `userActiveStatusConfig.alignment: UserActiveStatusAlignment` |
| Unread count badge | `unreadCountConfig: UnreadCountConfig` |
| Unread badge color | `unreadCountConfig.backgroundColor` |
| Typing indicator | `typingStatusConfig: TypingStatusConfig` |
| Message read status icon | `lastMessageStatusConfig: LastMessageStatusConfig` |
| Last message time | `timeConfig: LastMessageTimeConfig` |
| Tile tap | `onTap: (ChatListItem) → void` |
| Tile padding | `padding` |
| Custom trailing widget | `trailingBuilder: (chat) → Widget` |
| Custom name widget | `userNameBuilder: (chat) → Widget` |
| Custom last message widget | `lastMessageTileBuilder: (message) → Widget` |

---

## ChatListController API

```dart
ChatListController(
  initialChatList: List<ChatListItem>,
  scrollController: ScrollController(),
)

controller.addChat(chat)
controller.removeChat(id)
controller.updateChat(id, (prev) => prev.copyWith(...))
controller.setSearchChats(list)         // filter displayed list
controller.clearSearch()                // restore full list
controller.chatListMap                  // Map<String, ChatListItem>
controller.pinnedChats                  // List<ChatListItem>
```

---

## Internationalization

```dart
// Add locale
PackageStrings.addLocaleObject('es', ChatViewLocale(
  today: 'Hoy', yesterday: 'Ayer', reply: 'Responder',
  you: 'Tú', send: 'Enviar', photo: 'Foto', message: 'Mensaje',
  more: 'Más', unsend: 'Desenviar', report: 'Reportar',
  repliedToYou: 'Te respondió', repliedBy: 'Respondido por',
  replyTo: 'Responder a', reactionPopupTitle: '...',
));

// Activate
PackageStrings.setLocale('es');
```

---

## Platform Setup Checklist

**iOS** (voice + images): add to `Info.plist`:
```xml
<key>NSCameraUsageDescription</key><string>...</string>
<key>NSMicrophoneUsageDescription</key><string>...</string>
<key>NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription</key><string>...</string>
```
Also: `platform :ios, '13.0'` in Podfile.

**Android** (voice): add to `AndroidManifest.xml`:
```xml
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO"/>
```
Also: `minSdkVersion 21` in `build.gradle`.

---

## Common Recipes

**Change bubble colors:**
```dart
chatBubbleConfig: ChatBubbleConfiguration(
  outgoingChatBubbleConfig: ChatBubble(color: Colors.blue),
  inComingChatBubbleConfig: ChatBubble(color: Colors.grey.shade200),
)
```

**Enable reactions with custom emojis:**
```dart
reactionPopupConfig: ReactionPopupConfiguration(
  emojiList: ['❤️', '👍', '😂', '😮', '😢', '🙏'],
  userReactionCallback: (message, emoji) { /* save to backend */ },
)
```

**Add voice messages:**
```dart
sendMessageConfig: SendMessageConfiguration(
  voiceRecordingConfiguration: VoiceRecordingConfiguration(
    recorderSettings: RecorderSettings(bitRate: 128000, sampleRate: 44100),
  ),
)
```

**Enable pagination:**
```dart
ChatView(
  featureActiveConfig: FeatureActiveConfig(enablePagination: true),
  isLastPage: () => loadedCount >= totalCount,
  loadMoreData: (direction, refMsg) async {
    final msgs = await api.fetch(direction, refMsg.id);
    chatController.loadMoreData(msgs, direction: direction);
  },
)
```

**Show quick reply suggestions:**
```dart
chatController.addReplySuggestions([
  SuggestionItemData(text: 'OK'),
  SuggestionItemData(text: 'Thanks!'),
]);
```

**Custom message type:**
```dart
// Send
Message(id: ..., message: jsonPayload, messageType: MessageType.custom, ...)

// Render
messageConfig: MessageConfiguration(
  customMessageBuilder: (replyMsg) => MyCustomWidget(data: replyMsg.message),
)
```

**Disable specific features:**
```dart
featureActiveConfig: FeatureActiveConfig(
  enableSwipeToReply: false,
  lastSeenAgoBuilderVisibility: false,
  receiptsBuilderVisibility: false,
  enableReactionPopup: false,
)
```
